Services

Smart digital services that power your growth.

Pick the piece you need — or use us end-to-end across strategy, design, engineering, and growth.

Book a Free Call
01 · Web

Custom Website Development

Fast, modern, mobile-first websites engineered to convert visitors into customers and rank on search.

02 · Software

Custom Software Development

Tailor-made platforms that fit your operations — built to automate workflows and scale with your team.

03 · Commerce

eCommerce Account Management

Listings, catalogs, ads, and growth support across Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, and your own store.

04 · Operations

CRM Integration

Centralize leads, customers, pipelines, and follow-ups with a CRM tuned to how your business actually sells.

05 · AI

AI Automation

Agentic workflows for lead follow-ups, support, reporting, and the repetitive work no one wants to do.

06 · Marketing

Social Media Marketing

Content, calendars, and community — built around a clear point of view, not random posting.

07 · Growth

Performance Ad Campaigns

Meta, Google, and PPC campaigns measured against pipeline and revenue, not vanity metrics.

08 · Design

UI / UX Design

Premium interfaces for websites, apps, and internal tools — designed by senior product designers.

09 · Brand

Graphic Design & Branding

Logos, identity systems, social creatives, and marketing collateral with a consistent visual voice.

10 · Security

Cybersecurity Services

Hardening, monitoring, and incident response for the systems your business depends on.

11 · Content

Content Writing

Web, blog, ad, and social copy that sounds like a human wrote it — because one did.

12 · Strategy

Consulting & Strategy

Plain-spoken guidance to plan, launch, improve, and scale your digital systems with confidence.

13 · Amazon

Amazon Listing Management

Launch, optimize, and scale your Amazon business with SEO-tuned listings, A+ content guidance, catalog management, image optimization, variations, and ongoing updates that lift visibility and conversions.

14 · Reputation

Review & Request Management

Build trust and improve reputation by automating Google review collection, customer feedback requests over email and SMS, response management, and review analytics.

Ecliptix Solutions provides smart digital solutions to help businesses grow online. We focus on quality, innovation, and client satisfaction.
